mapper.sql: id, schedule_id, total_num, remain_num, fee, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT ns.*, s.doctor_id, s.visit_date, s.visit_time FROM number_source ns LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ns.schedule_id = s.id WHERE s.doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY ns.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM number_source WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM number_source ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO number_source (schedule_id, total_num, remain_num, fee, status, create_time) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{totalNum}, #{remainNum}, #{fee}, #{status}, NOW())
